title: rubus hirtus var. axillaris
intro: Rubus hirtus var. axillaris, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Bramble, is a type of plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, fever, and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. axillaris include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and improving overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
